text: Cities should expand bike lanes. A 2022 transport study covering 14 European cities reported a 31% rise in cycling and a 9% fall in road injuries within two years of expansion.
label: strong

text: Cities should expand bike lanes. Everyone I know loves cycling and the streets are nicer when there are fewer cars.
label: weak

text: Cities should expand bike lanes. Many studies suggest cycling has benefits.
label: borderline

text: We should ban a popular sweetener. A meta-analysis of 19 randomised trials found no causal effect on weight, yet the writer concludes that the sweetener still causes obesity.
label: weak

text: Remote work raises productivity. A randomised trial at Ctrip of 249 employees found a 13% productivity gain and a 50% drop in attrition over nine months.
label: strong

text: Remote work raises productivity. I have been working from home for years and have never been more focused.
label: weak

text: Remote work raises productivity. According to several recent studies, productivity tends to improve in flexible arrangements.
label: borderline

text: This drug is safe in pregnancy. The FDA reviewed seven prospective cohort studies covering 12,000 pregnancies and found no increase in birth defects above background rate.
label: strong

text: This drug is safe in pregnancy. My sister took it twice and her kids are fine.
label: weak

text: This drug is safe in pregnancy. Doctors prescribe it routinely, so it must be safe.
label: weak

text: Open-plan offices reduce focus. A 2018 Bernstein and Turban field study tracked 152 workers and found face-to-face interaction fell 70% after switching to open plan, with email use rising 56%.
label: strong

text: Open-plan offices reduce focus. I cannot concentrate when people walk by my desk.
label: weak

text: Open-plan offices reduce focus. Research has shown that many workers find them distracting.
label: borderline

text: Teenagers should sleep more. A 2014 American Academy of Pediatrics review of 38 studies recommends school start times no earlier than 8:30am, based on documented gains in attendance and grades.
label: strong

text: Teenagers should sleep more. When my son got an extra hour, his grades went up.
label: weak

text: Teenagers should sleep more. Studies indicate that sleep is important for adolescents.
label: borderline

text: We should ban a popular sweetener. Most people I have surveyed at the gym think it is harmful.
label: weak

text: Coffee consumption reduces type 2 diabetes risk. A 2014 Harvard meta-analysis of 28 prospective studies covering 1.1 million participants found a 9% lower risk per cup per day.
label: strong

text: Coffee consumption reduces type 2 diabetes risk. My grandfather drank coffee his whole life and never had diabetes.
label: weak

text: Coffee consumption reduces type 2 diabetes risk. Coffee has been studied extensively and is generally seen as beneficial.
label: borderline

text: This bridge design is safe. A finite element model with 1.4 million elements predicts a load factor of 2.3, above the 1.8 minimum specified by AASHTO.
label: strong

text: This bridge design is safe. The engineer in charge has 20 years of experience.
label: weak

text: Universal pre-K helps reading scores. A randomised lottery in Boston tracked 4,200 children and found a 9-point reading gain by grade 3 among lottery winners.
label: strong

text: Universal pre-K helps reading scores. Pre-K is widely supported by educators, so it must work.
label: weak

text: Universal pre-K helps reading scores. Many studies have looked at this and the trend tends to be positive.
label: borderline

text: AI tutoring improves learning. A 2024 RCT in Nigeria with 1,068 students showed 0.6 standard deviation gains in math after six weeks of GPT-4 tutoring vs business as usual.
label: strong

text: AI tutoring improves learning. The teachers I know are excited about it.
label: weak

text: AI tutoring improves learning. Recent papers in EdTech indicate promising results across various age groups.
label: borderline

text: Vegetarian diets reduce cardiovascular risk. A 2019 meta-analysis of 86 studies found a 25% lower risk of coronary heart disease in vegetarians vs omnivores.
label: strong

text: Vegetarian diets reduce cardiovascular risk. Most of the healthiest people I know are vegetarians.
label: weak

text: Vegetarian diets reduce cardiovascular risk. Plant-based eating is broadly considered heart-healthy.
label: borderline

text: Speed cameras reduce crashes. A UK Department for Transport audit of 4,100 camera sites found a 22% reduction in fatal and serious injuries.
label: strong

text: Speed cameras reduce crashes. I drive past one every day and the road feels safer.
label: weak

text: Speed cameras reduce crashes. Cameras have been studied in many countries with broadly positive effects.
label: borderline

text: This factory polluted the river. Water samples at the discharge point exceeded the legal lead limit by 12x across 14 of 16 weekly tests.
label: strong

text: This factory polluted the river. The factory is owned by a company with a bad reputation.
label: weak

text: This factory polluted the river. Local fishermen report the river has changed in recent years.
label: borderline

text: Cell phones cause brain cancer. INTERPHONE, a 13-country case-control study of 5,117 cases, found no consistent increase in glioma risk.
label: weak

text: Higher minimum wages reduce employment. A 1992 Card and Krueger study of fast-food restaurants in New Jersey and Pennsylvania found no significant employment drop after a wage hike, but the author cites this as evidence wages should not be raised.
label: weak

text: Higher minimum wages reduce employment. A 2019 CBO meta-analysis projected a 1.3 million job loss under a $15 federal minimum, with a confidence interval crossing zero.
label: borderline

text: Vaccines are effective. A 2020 Phase 3 trial of 43,548 participants showed 95% efficacy against symptomatic COVID-19 after two doses.
label: strong

text: Vaccines are effective. Most doctors recommend them.
label: weak

text: Vaccines are effective. The literature generally supports their use.
label: borderline

text: Reading aloud helps language development. A 2018 longitudinal study of 1,400 toddlers found vocabulary growth 0.5 SD higher among those read to daily.
label: strong

text: Reading aloud helps language development. Parents have been reading to children for centuries; clearly it works.
label: weak

text: Reading aloud helps language development. Most early-childhood researchers consider it beneficial.
label: borderline

text: Solar power is now the cheapest energy source. The 2024 IEA report puts unsubsidised utility-scale PV LCOE at USD 30-50/MWh, below new gas combined-cycle at USD 50-95/MWh.
label: strong

text: Solar power is now the cheapest energy source. Everyone I know is installing panels.
label: weak

text: Solar power is now the cheapest energy source. Solar has gotten dramatically cheaper according to many reports.
label: borderline

text: This algorithm is fair. We checked on 100 examples in our office and it looked fine.
label: weak

text: This algorithm is fair. Audit on 50,000 held-out examples showed false-positive rate parity within 1.2 percentage points across all subgroups, well under the 5pp disparity benchmark.
label: strong

text: This algorithm is fair. The model was built by a respected team at a top lab.
label: weak

text: This algorithm is fair. Internal tests on a few thousand examples did not reveal anything alarming.
label: borderline

text: This product is popular. Internal sales records show 1.2 million units sold in Q1, a 38% rise year over year.
label: strong

text: This product is popular. My friends have all bought one.
label: weak

text: This product is popular. It has been featured in many lifestyle articles this year.
label: borderline

text: Yoga reduces chronic back pain. A 2017 Cochrane review of 12 RCTs with 1,080 participants found moderate-quality evidence of pain reduction at 3 and 6 months.
label: strong

text: Yoga reduces chronic back pain. I tried yoga and my back hurts less.
label: weak

text: This investment is safe. The fund has returned 9% annually for the last three years.
label: borderline

text: This investment is safe. It is managed by a well-known firm.
label: weak

text: Most people in this country support the policy. A nationally representative poll of 2,034 adults, weighted to census demographics, finds 67% in favour with a margin of error of plus or minus 3%.
label: strong

text: Most people in this country support the policy. Three of my coworkers said they like it.
label: weak

text: Most people in this country support the policy. Multiple polls have shown majority support.
label: borderline

text: This program reduces recidivism. A randomised evaluation of 850 ex-offenders found a 14 percentage-point drop in re-arrest at two years, p < 0.01.
label: strong

text: This program reduces recidivism. Some participants have written grateful letters.
label: weak

text: This program reduces recidivism. Programs of this kind have shown encouraging results in the past.
label: borderline

text: Sugary drinks contribute to obesity. A 2013 NEJM cohort study of 33,097 individuals found a 1 SD higher sugary-drink intake associated with a 1.5 kg/m2 higher BMI over 10 years.
label: strong

text: Sugary drinks contribute to obesity. My nephew gained weight after drinking soda every day.
label: weak

text: Sugary drinks contribute to obesity. The nutrition literature broadly supports a link.
label: borderline

text: This camera lens is sharper than the previous version. A controlled MTF50 test at f/4 on the same camera body showed 2,650 lp/ph for the new lens vs 2,200 lp/ph for the old.
label: strong

text: This camera lens is sharper than the previous version. I shot a few photos and they look sharper to me.
label: weak

text: This camera lens is sharper than the previous version. Several reviewers have praised its image quality.
label: borderline
